_publications._publicationTitle: Stepwise crosstalk between aberrant Nf1, Tp53 and Rb signalling pathways induces gliomagenesis in zebrafish.

_contextSnippet: quantification of the percentages of Pcna-positive cells showed significant reductions in the number of Pcna-positive proliferative cells in TMZ-treated 3-month-old nf1 KO and nf1;tp53 cKO fish (48.7% and 32.3%, respectively)
details: Reduced Pcna-positive proliferative cells by 48.7% in nf1 KO fish and 32.3% in nf1;tp53 cKO fish
